title: Import negative number from Excel
excerpt: I loaded an Excel file into an existing board. The Excel file had some negative values, but they were loaded as positive values. Any idea why Monday did not recognize the negatives. The import file is .xlsx. Thanks!

posts.author: mdalzell (Meredith Dalzell)
posts.cookedHtml: I loaded an Excel file into an existing board. The Excel file had some negative values, but they were loaded as positive values. Any idea why Monday did not recognize the negatives. The import file is .xlsx. Thanks!

posts.author: mdalzell (Meredith Dalzell)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m not sure why, but a subsequent file loaded the negatives just fine. Case closed.
